title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) - Reflected
proof:
GET /vulnerabilities/xss_r/?name=%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C/script%3E&Submit=Submit returned '
Hello
' - the script tag is reflected verbatim in the response inside a pre tag with no sanitization or encoding.
poc_steps: Observe script tag rendered directly in the HTML response
